hero_match.title: Chelsea vs PSG - UEFA Champions League Round of 16 (2nd Leg)

ranked_matches.title: Manchester City vs Real Madrid - UEFA Champions League Round of 16 (2nd Leg)
Arsenal vs Bayer Leverkusen - UEFA Champions League Round of 16 (2nd Leg)
Sporting CP vs Bodø / Glimt - UEFA Champions League Round of 16 (2nd Leg)
FC St. Gallen vs. FC Lugano - Swiss Super League

summary: It's a massive day for European football with the second legs of the UEFA Champions League Round of 16 taking place, featuring Chelsea vs PSG and Man City vs Real Madrid. The Women's Africa Cup of Nations also kicks off today in Morocco. Several English Championship fixtures are also scheduled.
